name: Tommy Tiernan
bio: Tommy Tiernan is an Irish comedian, actor and writer known for high-energy, free-associating and confrontational stand-up rooted in Irish life, religion and language. He won the Perrier Award in 1998 and has built a prolific touring and DVD career. He also hosts the unscripted RTE chat programme The Tommy Tiernan Show and played Gerry in the sitcom Derry Girls.

timeline.ev: Wins the So You Think Youre Funny award at the Edinburgh Fringe
Wins the Perrier Award at the Edinburgh Festival
Performs at the Just for Laughs festival in Montreal
Performs his 200th Vicar Street show in Dublin
Begins hosting The Tommy Tiernan Show on RTE One
Begins playing Gerry in the sitcom Derry Girls

accolades: So You Think Youre Funny award (1996)
Host of the long-running The Tommy Tiernan Show
